heading: Disposition of certain funds appropriated for allotments
label: 300x–54 Disposition of certain funds appropriated for allotments

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: Amounts described in subsection (b) and available for a fiscal year pursuant to section 300x or 300x–21 of this title, as the case may be, shall be allotted by the Secretary and paid to the States receiving a grant under the program involved, other than any State referred to in subsection (b) with respect to such program. Such amounts shall be allotted in a manner equivalent to the manner in which the allotment under the program involved was determined.

children.label: A
children.text: the failure of any State to submit an application in accordance with the program;

children.label: B
children.text: the failure of any State to prepare such application in compliance with the program; or

children.label: C
children.text: any State informing the Secretary that the State does not intend to expend the full amount of the allotment made to the State under the program;
are terminated, repaid, or offset under ;section 300x–55 of this title

in the case of the program established in , are available as a result of reductions in allotments under such section pursuant to section 300x–1(d) or 300x–4(b) of this title; orsection 300x of this title
in the case of the program established in , are available as a result of reductions in allotments under such section pursuant to section 300x–26 or 300x–30 of this title.section 300x–21 of this title
